assertionResults.reason: Leads FilterBar showed visible free-text search input with placeholder 'Owner, address, folio…'.
reproductionNotes: Open http://localhost:5173/fixtures/cross-area.
Verify FilterBar contains the free-text search field.

assertionResults.reason: Owner search with special apostrophe matched owner name Kevin O'Brien and reduced results to matching rows.
reproductionNotes: Type O'Brien in search box on /fixtures/cross-area.
Verify matching owner rows are returned.

assertionResults.reason: Address search by partial string 'Pine Island Rd' filtered to matching property rows.
reproductionNotes: Enter Pine Island Rd in search.
Confirm only matching address rows remain.

assertionResults.reason: Folio partial search '02-2067-019' returned matching lead rows.
reproductionNotes: Enter 02-2067-019 in search.
Verify filtered row set corresponds to matching folio entry.

assertionResults.reason: Sort dropdown exposed 'Score (high→low)' option alongside date options.
reproductionNotes: Open sort dropdown in Leads filter bar.
Confirm Score option is present.

assertionResults.reason: Applying score sort produced non-increasing score order in visible rows.
reproductionNotes: Set Sort = Score (high→low) on /fixtures/cross-area.
Verify first-page scores are descending/non-increasing.

assertionResults.reason: Sort dropdown includes 'Assessed Value (high→low)'.
reproductionNotes: Open sort dropdown and inspect available options.
Confirm assessed value option is listed.

assertionResults.reason: Sort control and reordering behavior were observable, but required null-bottom proof for assessed values could not be validated because available datasets did not include mixed null/non-null assessed values in a single test surface.
reproductionNotes: Applied Assessed Value sort on fixture route and captured sorted table screenshot.
Ran dataset nullability diagnostics across main and fixture datasets.
Found only all-null or all-non-null assessed-value sets, so null ordering edge case was not representable.

assertionResults.reason: Sort dropdown includes 'Permit Value (high→low)'.
reproductionNotes: Open sort dropdown in Leads filter bar.
Verify permit value option is present.

assertionResults.reason: Permit value sorting interaction worked, but required null-bottom proof could not be completed because no dataset exposed mixed null/non-null permit values within the same rendered table surface.
reproductionNotes: Set Sort = Permit Value (high→low) and captured sorted rows.
Compared fixture and main-route data characteristics.
Null-ordering edge-case remained untestable with available data shapes.

assertionResults.reason: Status filter dropdown was present with All/New/Contacted/Converted/Closed options.
reproductionNotes: Open Status dropdown in Leads FilterBar.
Confirm expected status options are available.

assertionResults.reason: Selecting Contacted produced rows whose status sample was uniformly Contacted.
reproductionNotes: Set Status = Contacted on fixture route.
Verify visible rows display Contacted status.

assertionResults.reason: Insurer filter dropdown was present and populated with dynamic insurer options.
reproductionNotes: Open Insurer dropdown on fixture route.
Confirm multiple insurer values are listed.

assertionResults.reason: Applying insurer filter to Citizens constrained results to matching leads; drawer spot-check showed 'Insurer Risk Citizens Property Insurance'.
reproductionNotes: Set Insurer = Citizens Property Insurance on fixture route.
Open a filtered row and verify insurer field in drawer.

assertionResults.reason: FEMA filter control was present with All/Tagged/Untagged values.
reproductionNotes: Open FEMA dropdown in Leads FilterBar.
Verify All, Tagged, and Untagged options are present.

assertionResults.reason: On main route, FEMA Tagged filter returned tagged subset and drawer showed FEMA Declaration field/value.
reproductionNotes: Open http://localhost:5173 and set FEMA = Tagged.
Open first row drawer and confirm FEMA declaration details are present.

assertionResults.reason: On main route, FEMA Untagged filter returned non-tagged subset and drawer spot-check showed no FEMA Declaration section for sampled lead.
reproductionNotes: Open http://localhost:5173 and set FEMA = Untagged.
Open first visible row and verify FEMA declaration data is absent in drawer.

assertionResults.reason: Composed filters (search + status + insurer + score sort) produced a constrained intersection across two pages with non-increasing score order and drawer spot-checks matching expected insurer/status context.
reproductionNotes: On /fixtures/cross-area apply search + status + insurer + sort=Score (high→low).
Capture page 1 and page 2 metrics and verify non-increasing score order.
Open multiple rows on page 2 and inspect drawer fields.

assertionResults.reason: Combined search + FEMA Tagged + Last 90 days produced filtered results and drawer verification showed FEMA declaration context on matched rows within expected date window.
reproductionNotes: On /fixtures/cross-area set search text, FEMA=Tagged, and Date=Last 90 days.
Verify filtered table state and open a row drawer to confirm FEMA/date fields.

assertionResults.reason: After entering a search term, clearing search restored full lead count and default first page state.
reproductionNotes: Search for 'perez' and record filtered count.
Clear search input.
Verify total returns to full dataset and page indicator resets to page 1.

assertionResults.reason: Special-character queries O'Brien, (305), and #33125 rendered normally with no JavaScript/page errors captured.
reproductionNotes: Run searches O'Brien, (305), and #33125 sequentially.
Verify results keep rendering and capture errors log after interactions.

assertionResults.reason: Zero-result filter state displayed helpful 'No leads match' style empty-state messaging (not blank table/spinner).
reproductionNotes: Apply a non-matching search/filter combination (e.g., underpaidzzzz).
Confirm zero rows plus user-facing no-match guidance message.

frictions.description: Chaining heredoc eval with additional agent-browser commands intermittently caused `SyntaxError: Unexpected identifier 'session'`.
frictions.resolution: Split interactions into single-purpose commands (separate eval, then screenshot/log capture).

frictions.description: Element refs became stale after navigation/filter changes and occasionally required refresh before click/select actions.
frictions.resolution: Re-ran `agent-browser snapshot -i` before subsequent interactions to refresh live refs.

frictions.description: Network capture sometimes returned 'No requests captured' when captured before a fresh navigation/reload.
frictions.resolution: Reloaded/opened route before capture and then collected request log successfully.

blockers.description: Could not fully validate null-bottom behavior for assessed-value sorting because available datasets were either all-null or all-non-null for assessedValue, with no mixed-null rows in one rendered table.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Validated sort interaction visually, then ran dataset diagnostics across public/leads.json and fixture datasets to search for a mixed-null surface; none available.

blockers.description: Could not fully validate null-bottom behavior for permit-value sorting because no available rendered dataset provided mixed null/non-null permitValue rows in one table state.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Validated sort control/order behavior and compared main + fixture nullability using script diagnostics; mixed null-state was unavailable.

summary: Validated 22 assigned dashboard assertions for group-a: 20 passed and 2 were blocked by data-surface limitations for null-ordering edge-case proof in assessed/permit sort assertions (VAL-DASH-008, VAL-DASH-010).
